column1: # GENERATED by bin/make_globin_panels.py - do not hand-edit coordinates.
# Coordinates derived from RefSeq gene models via bin/hgvs_map.py and
# cross-checked against the reference FASTA. Review the allele/HGVS
# curation in that script; never review coordinates by eye.
# Consumed by OmniGen from the germline VCF. HBB is not in a segmental
# duplication, so ordinary SNV calls here are reliable - this panel is a
# NOT a complete beta-thal panel: ~280 alleles are known and this covers the
# common ones by population. Absence of a hit is NOT a negative result.
# coding_ref/alt are on the TRANSCRIPT strand; genomic_ref/alt are what a
# pileup or VCF will actually show. HBB is minus-strand: they differ.
# For indels, pos is the first affected coding base; a VCF will anchor one
# base away per its own convention - do not compare positions naively.
